description: Extract shared auth/session helpers and Convex wrappers into package infrastructure using configurable APIs and generated-API-safe adapter boundaries.
deviation_notes: Phase 1 complete: Created packages/core-auth and packages/core-convex with extracted constants, session, password-policy, demo-provisioning (core-auth) and admin, config (core-convex). Both packages pass typecheck and tests (17 tests core-auth, 6 tests core-convex). Lint deferred due to missing eslint devDependencies (pre-existing issue per tech-debt item 45).
